name: suprapost
description: SupraPost — AI social automation bot. Monorepo: backend (Express + DeepSeek + Telegram + scheduler) + frontend (React/Vite dashboard).

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --no-save concurrently
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c green,cyan "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.start: npm run build && npm start --prefix backend
